step_rationale: FOXM1 is a master EndMT transcription factor driving endothelial loss.
mechanism: FOXM1 transcriptional activation promotes endothelial-to-mesenchymal transition, reducing endothelial integrity and contributing to vascular dysfunction in atherosclerotic lesions.

references.title: Wnt Site Signaling Inhibitor Secreted Frizzled-Related Protein 3 Protects Mitral Valve Endothelium From Myocardial Infarction-Induced Endothelial-to-Mesenchymal Transition.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
